routines.name: morning_scan
routines.description: Morning market open scan — assess trend, map S/R, look for opening signals
actions: Run full scanner on SPY and QQQ
Determine market direction (uptrend / downtrend / sideways)
Identify key support and resistance levels for the session
Check for any opening hammer or hanging man signals on first 1H candle
Write scan results to journal/YYYY-MM-DD-morning.json
If confirmed signal exists and trend aligns: execute buy via cardona_trade.py
routines.no_trade_condition: Sideways trend on 1H chart — wait for direction

routines.name: hourly_check_1000
actions: Scan SPY and QQQ for new hammer or hanging man signals
Check all open options positions for take profit (90%+ gain)
If take profit threshold hit: execute close via cardona_trade.py close
If new confirmed signal and trend aligns and slots available: execute buy
Log check results to journal/YYYY-MM-DD-1000.json

routines.name: hourly_check_1500
routines.description: 3:00 PM hourly pattern scan — last entry window
actions: Scan SPY and QQQ for new hammer or hanging man signals
Check all open options positions for take profit (90%+ gain)
If take profit threshold hit: execute close via cardona_trade.py close
If new confirmed signal and trend aligns and slots available: execute buy
Log check results to journal/YYYY-MM-DD-1500.json
Note: this is the last entry window of the day — no new trades after 3 PM

routines.name: eod_journal
routines.description: End of day journal — summarize session, update lessons, send email digest
actions: Pull final positions and P&L from cardona_trade.py status
Review all trades opened or closed today
Write lessons for any closed trades to memory/lessons.md
Update memory/cycles.md with today's trade results
Write full daily summary to journal/YYYY-MM-DD-eod.json
Send email digest via notify.py

notes: No trades allowed when market direction is SIDEWAYS on 1H chart
No new trades after 3:00 PM ET — existing positions can still be monitored
Max 2 options positions open at any time
Max $200 per trade — budget enforced by cardona_trade.py
Take profit at 90%+ gain — close immediately
Stop loss: none — let options expire per Cardona strategy
Run /cardona_check in Claude Code for a full manual check at any time
